title: Photocatalytic removal of textile wastewater-originated methylene blue and malachite green dyes using spent black tea extract-coated silver nanoparticles

errors.description: The error in Fig. 4 is that the UV-Vis spectrum for the "chemically synthesized Ag nanoparticles" displays an artifact—a sharp, anomalous peak at ~260 nm—due to unfiltered junk data not being removed before plotting, and the horizontal axis label is also misspelled.
